lines.speaker: Lalli
lines.text: Bah! Puny humans always try steal Lallis' golden apples! You go away now!

sections.title: Attempting to put anything in Lalli's Stew

lines.speaker: Lalli
lines.text: Hey human! You not put things in Lalli's food unless Lalli ask you to! It am very impolite, even for human!

lines.speaker: Lalli
lines.text: Hey human! You not go in my house! It where me keep all my stuff!

lines.speaker: Lalli
lines.text: Ha! Stupid human! You no get any golden apples! Even though me much like stone soup!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I please have some more golden wool?

lines.speaker: Lalli
lines.text: Me will sell you some golden wool, but me not sell you any golden apples!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much for the golden wool?

lines.speaker: Lalli
lines.text: Me want 1000 coins! You pay or go!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that all? Here you go!

lines.speaker: Lalli
lines.text: Ha! Stupid human think he buy golden apples, but actually get stupid wool! Hahaha!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have that much cash on me...

lines.speaker: Lalli
lines.text: Well stupid bad trade human don't get no wool then! Or any golden apples!

lines.speaker: Lalli
lines.text: You no pay, then you go! You no get any golden apples!

sections.title: Using a bowl on Lalli's Stew after quest

lines.speaker: Lalli
lines.text: Hey human! You not go back on deal! Me know you stupid at trades but that stone mine now! All soup mine!
